/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cua_capture.dir/link.d -shared  -o cua_capture.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/cua_capture.dir/src/ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cua_capture.dir/src/pipewire_capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cua_capture.dir/src/input_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cua_capture.dir/src/action_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cua_capture.dir/src/bindings.cpp.o  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpipewire-0.3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libevdev.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libturbojpeg.so
